_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type the text markdown: **bold** and *italic* and `code` into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the agent message to render markdown. The last agent message (".message-agent") should contain a <strong> element with text "bold", an <em> element with text "italic", and a <code> element with text "code".
